_comment: Provenance pins for the frankenmermaid <-> mermaid-js head-to-head. Any drift here invalidates the recorded ratios. Regenerate the bundle hash with `node mermaid_bench.mjs --pin`, and the corpus hashes with `node run.mjs --update-pins`.

mermaid._security_level_note: mermaid's own default is 'strict' (DOMPurify sanitization on). Earlier ad-hoc comparators used 'loose', which makes mermaid *faster* and therefore understates our speedup. We use mermaid's default so the comparison reflects what a mermaid user actually runs.
mermaid._limits_note: maxEdges/maxTextSize are raised above mermaid's defaults (500 / 50000) only so the large corpus items render at all. They are guardrails, not performance knobs.

chromium._note: Snap-confined Chromium's `home` interface denies hidden dirs under $HOME, so each run gets a fresh mkdtemp profile under ~/snap/chromium/common. Diagram text is injected over CDP; the browser never reads the corpus from disk.
